name: Raspberry Glace Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake pie shell according to your recipe or package directions.
2. Mash enough berries to measure 1 cup using a fork or potato masher.
3. In a saucepan, stir together sugar and cornstarch until no lumps remain.
4. Gradually add water while stirring continuously over medium heat.
5. Continue cooking and stirring until the mixture thickens and boils for about 1 minute.
6. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
7. Beat cream cheese until smooth; spread evenly on the bottom of the baked pie shell.
8. Fill the remaining pie shell with raspberries, then pour the cooked berry sauce over the top.
9. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours or until set before serving.
